description: Multiple errors: typo in column name (namr -> name), missing SELECT keyword, and extra comma in SELECT list
fixed_query:
SELECT name, current_balance
FROM brex_data.account
WHERE current_balance > 0
ORDER BY current_balance DESC
LIMIT 10
broken_query:
namr, current_balance,
FROM brex_data.account
WHERE current_balance > 0
ORDER BY current_balance DESC
LIMIT 10
error_message:
ERROR: syntax error at or near "namr"
  Position: 119

description: Multiple errors: typo in SQL keyword (FORM -> FROM), unclosed quote in string literal, and invalid operator (ISNOT)
fixed_query:
SELECT id, first_name, last_name
FROM salesforce_data.contact
WHERE last_name LIKE '%Smith%'
  AND phone IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 10
broken_query:
SELECT id, first_name, last_name
FORM salesforce_data.contact
WHERE last_name LIKE '%Smith%
  AND phone ISNOT NULL
LIMIT 10
error_message:
Unterminated string literal started at position 201 in SQL -- Metabase:: userID: 1 queryType: native queryHash: 66f1e3cf53ca15bcd6cdfbad83ec2736b88123fea770f10d869d09ec4c310581
SELECT id, first_name, last_name
FORM salesforce_data.contact
WHERE last_name LIKE '%Smith%
  AND phone ISNOT NULL
LIMIT 10. Expected  char

description: Multiple errors: invalid logical operator (&&), missing closing parenthesis, and typo in column name (slg -> slug)
fixed_query:
SELECT uri, name, slug
FROM calendly_data.event_type
WHERE (active = true AND duration > 30)
LIMIT 10
broken_query:
SELECT uri, name, slg
FROM calendly_data.event_type
WHERE (active = true && duration > 30
LIMIT 10
error_message:
ERROR: syntax error at or near ">"
  Position: 204

description: Multiple errors: missing GROUP BY clause, typo in aggregation function (COUT -> COUNT), and invalid alias reference
fixed_query:
SELECT email, COUNT(*)
FROM customerio_data.customer c
WHERE c.created_at > '2023-01-01'
GROUP BY email
LIMIT 10
broken_query:
SELECT email, COUT(*)
FROM customerio_data.customer c
WHERE cust.created_at > '2023-01-01'
LIMIT 10
error_message:
ERROR: function cout() does not exist
  Hint: No function matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.
  Position: 133

description: Multiple errors: missing JOIN ON condition, mixing up columns from JOINed tables, and extra trailing comma
fixed_query:
SELECT
  u.email,
  c.card_name,
  c.status
FROM brex_data.user u
JOIN brex_data.card c
  ON u.id = c.owner_user_id
LIMIT 5
broken_query:
SELECT
  u.email,
  c.card_name,
  u.status,
FROM brex_data.user u
JOIN brex_data.card c
LIMIT 5
error_message:
ERROR: syntax error at or near "FROM"
  Position: 164

description: Multiple errors: invalid CASE expression missing END keyword, typo in column name, and missing comma in SELECT list
fixed_query:
SELECT
  id,
  total_price,
  CASE
    WHEN total_price > 100 THEN 'high'
    ELSE 'low'
  END AS price_tier
FROM shopify_data.order
LIMIT 10
broken_query:
SELECT
  id,
  totl_price
  CASE
    WHEN total_price > 100 THEN 'high'
    ELSE 'low'
  AS price_tier
FROM shopify_data.order
LIMIT 10
error_message:
ERROR: syntax error at or near "WHEN"
  Position: 156

description: Multiple errors: attempt to use aggregated column in WHERE instead of HAVING, missing closing parenthesis in function call, and invalid SQL keyword (WERE -> WHERE)
fixed_query:
SELECT status, COUNT(*)
FROM google_adwords_data.campaign
WHERE status IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY status
HAVING COUNT(*) > 5
LIMIT 10
broken_query:
SELECT status, COUNT(
FROM google_adwords_data.campaign
WERE status IS NOT NULL
  AND COUNT(*) > 5
GROUP BY status
LIMIT 10
error_message:
ERROR: syntax error at or near "FROM"
  Position: 141

description: Multiple errors: invalid CTE missing AS keyword, referencing undefined CTE name, and extra decimal point in numeric literal
fixed_query:
WITH recent_customers AS (
  SELECT id, email
  FROM stripe_data.customer
  WHERE created > '2023-01-01'
)
SELECT rc.email, COUNT(ch.id)
FROM recent_customers rc
LEFT JOIN stripe_data.charge ch
  ON rc.id = ch.customer_id
GROUP BY rc.email
broken_query:
WITH recent_customers (
  SELECT id, email
  FROM stripe_data.customer
  WHERE created > '2023-01-01'
)
SELECT rc.email, COUNT(ch.id)
FROM recent_customer rc
LEFT JOIN stripe_data.charge ch
  ON rc.id = ch.customer_id
GROUP BY rc.email
error_message:
ERROR: syntax error at or near "SELECT"
  Position: 145

description: Multiple errors: missing GROUP BY, invalid aggregation function with no arguments, ambiguous column reference in multiple JOINs, and invalid LIMIT clause
fixed_query:
SELECT o.id AS order_id, COUNT(*) AS count_rows
FROM shopify_data.order o
JOIN shopify_data.order_line ol
  ON o.id = ol.order_id
JOIN shopify_data.customer c
  ON o.customer_id = c.id
GROUP BY o.id
LIMIT 10
broken_query:
SELECT id AS order_id, COUNT() AS count_rows
FROM shopify_data.order o
JOIN shopify_data.order_line ol
  ON o.id = ol.order_id
JOIN shopify_data.customer c
  ON o.customer_id = c.id
LIMIT ten
error_message:
ERROR: column reference "id" is ambiguous
  Position: 126

description: Multiple errors: MySQL-style backticks for identifier quoting instead of double quotes
fixed_query:
SELECT
  "name",
  current_balance AS "account balance"
FROM brex_data.account
WHERE "name" IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 10
broken_query:
SELECT
  `name`,
  current_balance AS `account balance`
FROM brex_data.account
WHERE `name` IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 10
error_message:
ERROR: syntax error at or near ","
  Position: 134
